--- START FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-application.entity.ts ---

import { Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, CreateDateColumn, ManyToOne, JoinColumn, Index } from 'typeorm';
import { Clan } from './clan.entity';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';

/**
 * Defines the possible statuses for a clan application.
 */
export enum ApplicationStatus {
  PENDING = 'pending',
  ACCEPTED = 'accepted',
  REJECTED = 'rejected',
}

/**
 * Represents a user's application to join a clan.
 * A unique index ensures a user cannot have more than one pending application
 * for the same clan at any given time.
 */
@Entity('clan_applications')
@Index(['clan_id', 'user_id'], { unique: true, where: "status = 'pending'" })
export class ClanApplication {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the application.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the clan being applied to.
   */
  @Column()
  clan_id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user who is applying.
   */
  @Column()
  user_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the Clan entity. If the clan is deleted, all its applications are also deleted.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => Clan, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'clan_id' })
  clan: Clan;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity. If the user is deleted, their applications are also deleted.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'user_id' })
  user: User;

  /**
   * A JSON object storing the applicant's answers to the questions
   * defined in the clan's `application_template`.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'jsonb' })
  answers: Record<string, any>;

  /**
   * The current status of the application.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'enum', enum: ApplicationStatus, default: ApplicationStatus.PENDING })
  status: ApplicationStatus;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the application was created.
   */
  @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'created_at' })
  created_at: Date;
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-application.entity.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan.entity.ts ---

import {
  Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, CreateDateColumn, UpdateDateColumn,
  ManyToOne, OneToMany, JoinColumn, Index
} from 'typeorm';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';
import { ClanMember } from './clan-member.entity';
import { ClanRole } from './clan-role.entity';
import { ClanMessage } from './clan-message.entity';

/**
 * Defines the possible join types for a clan.
 */
export enum ClanJoinType {
  OPEN = 'open',
  APPLICATION = 'application',
  CLOSED = 'closed',
}

/**
 * Represents a clan in the database. This is the central entity for the clan system,
 * holding information about the clan's identity, owner, and settings.
 */
@Entity('clans')
export class Clan {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the clan.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The display name of the clan.
   */
  @Column({ length: 100 })
  name: string;

  /**
   * The unique tag used for mentions and URLs (e.g., @tag).
   */
  @Index({ unique: true })
  @Column({ length: 50, unique: true })
  tag: string;

  /**
   * An optional detailed description of the clan.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'text', nullable: true })
  description: string | null;

  /**
   * An optional URL for the clan's banner image, displayed on its profile page.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'card_image_url', type: 'varchar', length: 255, nullable: true })
  card_image_url: string | null;

  /**
   * An optional URL for the clan's icon.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'card_icon_url', type: 'varchar', length: 255, nullable: true })
  card_icon_url: string | null;

  /**
   * The hex color code for the background of the clan's display card.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'card_color', type: 'varchar', length: 7, default: '#32383E' })
  card_color: string;

  /**
   * The hex color code for the text on the clan's display card.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 7, name: 'text_color', nullable: true, default: '#F0F4F8' })
  text_color: string | null;

  /**
   * The method by which new members can join the clan.
   */
  @Column({
    type: 'enum',
    enum: ClanJoinType,
    default: ClanJoinType.CLOSED,
  })
  join_type: ClanJoinType;

  /**
   * A JSON object that defines the structure of the application form for this clan.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'jsonb', name: 'application_template', nullable: true })
  application_template: Record<string, any> | null;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the User who owns the clan.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'owner_id' })
  owner_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity of the owner.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User)
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'owner_id' })
  owner: User;

  /**
   * A one-to-many relationship with all messages sent in this clan's chat.
   */
  @OneToMany(() => ClanMessage, (message) => message.clan)
  messages: ClanMessage[];

  /**
   * A one-to-many relationship with all members of this clan.
   */
  @OneToMany(() => ClanMember, (member) => member.clan)
  members: ClanMember[];

  /**
   * A one-to-many relationship with all roles created for this clan.
   */
  @OneToMany(() => ClanRole, (role) => role.clan)
  roles: ClanRole[];

  /**
   * The timestamp when the clan was created.
   */
  @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'created_at' })
  created_at: Date;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the clan was last updated.
   */
  @UpdateDateColumn({ name: 'updated_at' })
  updated_at: Date;
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan.entity.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-invitation.entity.ts ---

import { Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, CreateDateColumn, ManyToOne, JoinColumn, Index } from 'typeorm';
import { Clan } from './clan.entity';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';

/**
 * Defines the possible statuses for a clan invitation.
 */
export enum InvitationStatus {
  PENDING = 'pending',
  ACCEPTED = 'accepted',
  DECLINED = 'declined',
  EXPIRED = 'expired',
}

/**
 * Represents an invitation sent from a clan member to another user to join their clan.
 */
@Entity('clan_invitations')
@Index(['clan_id', 'invitee_id'], { where: "status = 'pending'", unique: true })
export class ClanInvitation {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the invitation.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the clan that sent the invitation.
   */
  @Column()
  clan_id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user who sent the invitation.
   */
  @Column()
  inviter_id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user who received the invitation.
   */
  @Column()
  invitee_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the Clan entity.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => Clan, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'clan_id' })
  clan: Clan;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity of the inviter.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'inviter_id' })
  inviter: User;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity of the invitee.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'invitee_id' })
  invitee: User;

  /**
   * The current status of the invitation.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'enum', enum: InvitationStatus, default: InvitationStatus.PENDING })
  status: InvitationStatus;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the invitation was created.
   */
  @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'created_at' })
  created_at: Date;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the invitation will expire.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'expires_at' })
  expires_at: Date;
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-invitation.entity.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-member.entity.ts ---

import { Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, ManyToOne, JoinColumn, Index, Column } from 'typeorm';
import { Clan } from './clan.entity';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';
import { ClanRole } from './clan-role.entity';

/**
 * Represents the membership of a user in a clan.
 * This entity links a user to a clan and assigns them a specific role.
 */
@Entity('clan_members')
@Index(['clan', 'user'], { unique: true })
export class ClanMember {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the membership record.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the clan.
   */
  @Column()
  clan_id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user.
   */
  @Column()
  user_id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the role assigned to this member.
   */
  @Column()
  role_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the Clan entity. If the clan is deleted, all its members are deleted.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => Clan, (clan) => clan.members, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'clan_id' })
  clan: Clan;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity. If the user is deleted, their membership is also deleted.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'user_id' })
  user: User;

  /**
   * The relationship to the ClanRole entity. If the role is deleted, the member's role_id becomes null.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => ClanRole, { onDelete: 'SET NULL', nullable: true })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'role_id' })
  role: ClanRole | null;

  /**
   * A flag indicating if the member is currently muted in the clan chat.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'boolean', default: false, name: 'is_muted' })
  is_muted: boolean;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the member's mute expires. Null if the mute is permanent or they are not muted.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'timestamp', name: 'mute_expires_at', nullable: true })
  mute_expires_at: Date | null;
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-member-history.entity.ts ---

import { Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, CreateDateColumn, ManyToOne, JoinColumn } from 'typeorm';
import { Clan } from './clan.entity';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';

/**
 * Represents a historical record of a user's membership in a clan.
 * This is used to track when users join and leave clans, allowing for features
 * like preventing re-applications too soon or allowing former members to leave reviews.
 */
@Entity('clan_member_history')
export class ClanMemberHistory {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the history record.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the clan.
   */
  @Column()
  clan_id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user.
   */
  @Column()
  user_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the Clan entity.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => Clan, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'clan_id' })
  clan: Clan;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'user_id' })
  user: User;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the user joined the clan.
   */
  @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'joined_at' })
  joined_at: Date;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the user left or was kicked from the clan.
   * Will be null if the user is currently a member.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'timestamp', name: 'left_at', nullable: true })
  left_at: Date | null;
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-message.entity.ts ---

import { Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, CreateDateColumn, ManyToOne, JoinColumn, OneToMany } from 'typeorm';
import { Clan } from './clan.entity';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';

/**
 * Defines the available chat channels within a clan.
 */
export enum ClanChatChannel {
    GENERAL = 'general',
    ADMIN = 'admin',
}

/**
 * Represents a single message sent in a clan's chat.
 */
@Entity('clan_messages')
export class ClanMessage {
    /**
     * The unique identifier for the message.
     */
    @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
    id: number;

    /**
     * The foreign key of the clan this message belongs to.
     */
    @Column()
    clan_id: number;

    /**
     * The relationship to the Clan entity.
     */
    @ManyToOne(() => Clan, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
    @JoinColumn({ name: 'clan_id' })
    clan: Clan;

    /**
     * The foreign key of the user who sent the message. Can be null for system messages or deleted authors.
     */
    @Column({ nullable: true })
    author_id: number | null;

    /**
     * The relationship to the User entity of the author.
     */
    @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'SET NULL', nullable: true })
    @JoinColumn({ name: 'author_id' })
    author: User | null;

    /**
     * The text content of the message.
     */
    @Column({ type: 'text' })
    content: string;

    /**
     * The channel within the clan chat where the message was sent.
     */
    @Column({
        type: 'enum',
        enum: ClanChatChannel,
        default: ClanChatChannel.GENERAL
    })
    channel: ClanChatChannel;

    /**
     * A self-referencing relationship for replies. This is the message being replied to.
     */
    @ManyToOne(() => ClanMessage, (message) => message.replies, {
        nullable: true,
        onDelete: 'SET NULL',
    })
    @JoinColumn({ name: 'parent_id' })
    parent: ClanMessage | null;

    /**
     * The foreign key for the parent message, if this is a reply.
     */
    @Column({ name: 'parent_id', nullable: true })
    parent_id: number | null;

    /**
     * A one-to-many relationship to all messages that are replies to this one.
     */
    @OneToMany(() => ClanMessage, (message) => message.parent)
    replies: ClanMessage[];

    /**
     * The timestamp when the message was created.
     */
    @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'created_at' })
    created_at: Date;
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-message.entity.ts ---

--- START FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-role.entity.ts ---

import { Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, ManyToOne, JoinColumn } from 'typeorm';
import { Clan } from './clan.entity';

/**
 * Interface defining clan-wide permissions for a role.
 */
interface ClanPermissions {
  canEditDetails: boolean;
  canEditAppearance: boolean;
  canEditRoles: boolean;
  canEditApplicationForm: boolean;
  canAcceptMembers: boolean;
  canInviteMembers: boolean;
  canUseClanTags: boolean;
  canAccessAdminChat: boolean;
}

/**
 * Interface defining permissions for actions against other members.
 * The values represent the maximum power level of a target that can be affected.
 */
interface MemberPermissions {
  maxKickPower: number;
  maxMutePower: number;
  maxPromotePower: number;
  maxDemotePower: number;
  maxWarnPower: number;
}

/**
 * Represents a role within a clan, defining a set of permissions for its members.
 */
@Entity('clan_roles')
export class ClanRole {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the role.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the clan this role belongs to.
   */
  @Column()
  clan_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the Clan entity.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => Clan, (clan) => clan.roles, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'clan_id' })
  clan: Clan;

  /**
   * The display name of the role.
   */
  @Column({ length: 50 })
  name: string;

  /**
   * The hex color code for displaying the role.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'varchar', length: 7, default: '#AAAAAA' })
  color: string;

  /**
   * The power level of the role, used for hierarchy checks. Higher is more powerful.
   */
  @Column({ default: 1 })
  power_level: number;

  /**
   * A JSON object containing the detailed permissions for this role.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'jsonb' })
  permissions: {
    clanPermissions: ClanPermissions,
    memberPermissions: MemberPermissions,
  };

  /**
   * A flag indicating if this is a system-generated role (e.g., "Leader", "Member")
   * that cannot be deleted.
   */
  @Column({ default: false })
  is_system_role: boolean;
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-role.entity.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/clans/entities/clan-warning.entity.ts ---

import { Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, CreateDateColumn, ManyToOne, JoinColumn } from 'typeorm';
import { Clan } from './clan.entity';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';

/**
 * Represents a formal warning issued to a clan member by another member with sufficient permissions.
 */
@Entity('clan_warnings')
export class ClanWarning {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the warning.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the clan where the warning was issued.
   */
  @Column()
  clan_id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user who issued the warning (the actor).
   */
  @Column()
  actor_id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user who received the warning (the target).
   */
  @Column()
  target_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the Clan entity.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => Clan, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'clan_id' })
  clan: Clan;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity of the actor.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'SET NULL', nullable: true })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'actor_id' })
  actor: User;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity of the target.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'target_id' })
  target: User;

  /**
   * The reason for the warning.
   */
  @Column({ type: 'text' })
  reason: string;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the warning was created.
   */
  @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'created_at' })
  created_at: Date;
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/comments/comments.controller.ts ---

import { Controller, Post, Body, Param, UseGuards, Request, ParseIntPipe, Patch, Delete } from '@nestjs/common';
import { CommentsService } from './comments.service';
import { CreateCommentDto } from './dto/create-comment.dto';
import { UpdateCommentDto } from './dto/update-comment.dto';
import { JwtAuthGuard } from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard';
import { ApiTags, ApiBearerAuth } from '@nestjs/swagger';
import { User } from '../users/entities/user.entity';

/**
 * Controller for handling comment creation and management.
 * All endpoints require user authentication.
 */
@ApiTags('Comments')
@Controller()
export class CommentsController {
  constructor(private readonly commentsService: CommentsService) { }

  /**
   * Creates a new comment on a specific post.
   * @param postId The ID of the post to comment on.
   * @param createCommentDto The data for the new comment.
   * @param req The incoming request object containing the authenticated user.
   * @returns The newly created comment entity.
   */
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
  @Post('posts/:postId/comments')
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  create(
    @Param('postId', ParseIntPipe) postId: number,
    @Body() createCommentDto: CreateCommentDto,
    @Request() req,
  ) {
    const dtoWithPostId = { ...createCommentDto, postId };
    return this.commentsService.create(dtoWithPostId, req.user);
  }

  /**
   * Updates an existing comment.
   * @param id The ID of the comment to update.
   * @param updateCommentDto The data to update.
   * @param req The incoming request object.
   * @returns The updated comment entity.
   */
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
  @Patch('comments/:id')
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  update(@Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number, @Body() updateCommentDto: UpdateCommentDto, @Request() req) {
    return this.commentsService.update(id, updateCommentDto, req.user as User);
  }

  /**
   * Deletes a comment.
   * @param id The ID of the comment to delete.
   * @param req The incoming request object.
   */
  @UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
  @Delete('comments/:id')
  @ApiBearerAuth()
  remove(@Param('id', ParseIntPipe) id: number, @Request() req) {
    return this.commentsService.remove(id, req.user as User);
  }
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/comments/comments.controller.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/comments/comments.module.ts ---

import { Module, forwardRef } from '@nestjs/common';
import { TypeOrmModule } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
import { CommentsService } from './comments.service';
import { CommentsController } from './comments.controller';
import { Comment } from './entities/comment.entity';
import { Post } from '../posts/entities/post.entity';
import { UsersModule } from '../users/users.module';
import { PostsModule } from '../posts/posts.module';

/**
 * Encapsulates all features related to comments.
 * It imports necessary modules and registers the Comment entity.
 */
@Module({
  imports: [
    TypeOrmModule.forFeature([Comment, Post]),
    UsersModule,
    forwardRef(() => PostsModule),
  ],
  controllers: [CommentsController],
  providers: [CommentsService],
  exports: [CommentsService],
})
export class CommentsModule { }

--- START FILE: backend/src/comments/comments.service.ts ---

import { ForbiddenException, Injectable, NotFoundException } from '@nestjs/common';
import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
import { IsNull, Repository, TreeRepository } from 'typeorm';
import { Comment } from './entities/comment.entity';
import { CreateCommentDto } from './dto/create-comment.dto';
import { UpdateCommentDto } from './dto/update-comment.dto';
import { User } from '../users/entities/user.entity';
import { Post } from '../posts/entities/post.entity';
import { EventEmitter2 } from '@nestjs/event-emitter';

/**
 * Service handling all business logic for comments.
 */
@Injectable()
export class CommentsService {
  constructor(
    @InjectRepository(Comment)
    private commentsRepository: TreeRepository<Comment>,
    @InjectRepository(Post)
    private postRepository: Repository<Post>,
    private readonly eventEmitter: EventEmitter2,
  ) { }

  /**
   * Creates a new comment and associates it with a post and an author.
   * @param createCommentDto DTO containing comment data.
   * @param author The user creating the comment.
   * @returns A promise that resolves to the newly created comment with author relations.
   * @throws NotFoundException if the post or parent comment is not found.
   */
  async create(createCommentDto: CreateCommentDto, author: User): Promise<Comment> {
    const { content, postId, parentId } = createCommentDto;
    const post = await this.postRepository.findOneBy({ id: postId });
    if (!post) throw new NotFoundException(`Post with ID ${postId} not found`);

    const comment = this.commentsRepository.create({
      content,
      postId,
      authorId: (author as any).userId,
    });

    if (parentId) {
      const parentComment = await this.commentsRepository.findOneBy({ id: parentId });
      if (!parentComment) throw new NotFoundException(`Parent comment with ID ${parentId} not found`);
      comment.parent = parentComment;
    }

    const savedComment = await this.commentsRepository.save(comment);
    this.eventEmitter.emit('comment.created', { authorId: author.id });

    return this.commentsRepository.findOneOrFail({
      where: { id: savedComment.id },
      relations: ['author', 'author.rank'],
    });
  }

  /**
   * Finds all comments for a given post and structures them into a tree.
   * @param postId The ID of the post.
   * @returns A promise that resolves to an array of root-level comments with nested children.
   * @throws NotFoundException if the post is not found.
   */
  async findAllForPost(postId: number): Promise<Comment[]> {
    const postExists = await this.postRepository.findOneBy({ id: postId });
    if (!postExists) throw new NotFoundException(`Post with ID ${postId} not found`);

    const allComments = await this.commentsRepository.find({
      where: { postId },
      relations: ['author', 'author.rank', 'votes', 'votes.voter'],
      order: { createdAt: 'ASC' },
    });

    const commentMap = new Map<number, Comment>();
    const rootComments: Comment[] = [];

    allComments.forEach(comment => {
      comment.children = [];
      commentMap.set(comment.id, comment);
    });

    allComments.forEach(comment => {
      if (comment.parentId) {
        const parent = commentMap.get(comment.parentId);
        if (parent) {
          if (!parent.children) parent.children = [];
          parent.children.push(comment);
        }
      } else {
        rootComments.push(comment);
      }
    });

    return rootComments;
  }

  /**
   * Finds a single comment by its ID.
   * @param id The ID of the comment to find.
   * @returns A promise resolving to the comment entity.
   * @throws NotFoundException if the comment is not found.
   */
  async findOne(id: number): Promise<Comment> {
    const comment = await this.commentsRepository.findOne({
      where: { id },
      relations: ['author', 'author.rank'],
    });
    if (!comment) {
      throw new NotFoundException(`Comment with ID ${id} not found`);
    }
    return comment;
  }

  /**
   * Updates a comment's content.
   * @param id The ID of the comment to update.
   * @param updateCommentDto DTO with the new content.
   * @param user The user performing the update.
   * @returns A promise resolving to the updated comment entity.
   * @throws ForbiddenException if the user is not the author or a moderator.
   */
  async update(id: number, updateCommentDto: UpdateCommentDto, user: User): Promise<Comment> {
    const comment = await this.findOne(id);
    const canManage = user?.rank?.power_level >= 800 || comment.authorId === (user as any).userId;
    if (!canManage) {
      throw new ForbiddenException('You are not allowed to edit this comment');
    }
    Object.assign(comment, updateCommentDto);
    return this.commentsRepository.save(comment);
  }

  /**
   * Removes a comment.
   * @param id The ID of the comment to remove.
   * @param user The user performing the removal.
   * @throws ForbiddenException if the user is not the author or a moderator.
   */
  async remove(id: number, user: User): Promise<void> {
    const comment = await this.findOne(id);
    const canManage = user?.rank?.power_level >= 800 || comment.authorId === (user as any).userId;
    if (!canManage) {
      throw new ForbiddenException('You are not allowed to delete this comment');
    }
    await this.commentsRepository.remove(comment);
  }
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/comments/comments.service.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/comments/dto/create-comment.dto.ts ---

import { IsInt, IsNotEmpty, IsOptional, IsString, MaxLength } from 'class-validator';

/**
 * Data Transfer Object (DTO) for creating a new comment.
 */
export class CreateCommentDto {
  /**
   * The text content of the comment.
   * @example "This is a great post!"
   */
  @IsString()
  @IsNotEmpty()
  @MaxLength(1000)
  content: string;

  /**
   * The ID of the post this comment belongs to.
   * This is optional in the DTO body as it's passed via URL parameter.
   */
  @IsInt()
  @IsOptional()
  postId?: number;

  /**
   * The ID of the parent comment if this is a reply.
   */
  @IsInt()
  @IsOptional()
  parentId?: number;
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/comments/dto/update-comment.dto.ts ---

import { IsOptional, IsString, MinLength, MaxLength } from 'class-validator';
import { ApiPropertyOptional } from '@nestjs/swagger';

/**
 * Data Transfer Object (DTO) for updating an existing comment.
 */
export class UpdateCommentDto {
  /**
   * The updated text content of the comment.
   * @example "I've changed my mind, this is an excellent post!"
   */
  @ApiPropertyOptional({
    example: 'Actually, I changed my mind. Great post!',
    description: 'The updated content of the comment',
    minLength: 1,
    maxLength: 1000,
  })
  @IsOptional()
  @IsString()
  @MinLength(1)
  @MaxLength(1000)
  content?: string;
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/comments/entities/comment.entity.ts ---

import {
  Entity, PrimaryGeneratedColumn, Column, ManyToOne, CreateDateColumn, UpdateDateColumn, JoinColumn, OneToMany, Tree, TreeChildren, TreeParent
} from 'typeorm';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';
import { Post } from '../../posts/entities/post.entity';
import { Vote } from '../../votes/entities/vote.entity';
import { Expose } from 'class-transformer';

/**
 * Represents a comment in the database.
 * Comments are structured as a tree to support nested replies.
 */
@Entity('comments')
@Tree('closure-table')
export class Comment {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the comment.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The text content of the comment.
   */
  @Column({ length: 1000 })
  content: string;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User who authored the comment.
   * If the author's account is deleted, the author is set to null.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, (user) => user.comments, { onDelete: 'SET NULL', nullable: true })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'author_id' })
  author: User;

  /**
   * The foreign key for the comment's author.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'author_id', nullable: true })
  authorId: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the Post this comment belongs to.
   * If the post is deleted, all its comments are also deleted.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => Post, (post) => post.comments, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'post_id' })
  post: Post;

  /**
   * The foreign key for the post.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'post_id' })
  postId: number;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the comment was created.
   */
  @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'created_at' })
  createdAt: Date;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the comment was last updated.
   */
  @UpdateDateColumn({ name: 'updated_at' })
  updatedAt: Date;

  /**
   * A self-referencing relationship for replies. This is the comment being replied to.
   */
  @TreeParent({ onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'parent_id' })
  parent: Comment;

  /**
   * The foreign key for the parent comment, if this is a reply.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'parent_id', nullable: true })
  parentId: number | null;

  /**
   * A one-to-many relationship to all comments that are replies to this one.
   */
  @TreeChildren()
  children: Comment[];

  /**
   * A one-to-many relationship with all votes cast on this comment.
   */
  @OneToMany(() => Vote, (vote) => vote.comment)
  votes: Vote[];

  /**
   * A virtual property to get the count of direct children.
   */
  @Expose()
  get childrenCount(): number {
    return this.children?.length || 0;
  }
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/comments/entities/comment.entity.ts ---

--- START FILE: backend/src/common/middleware/logger.middleware.ts ---

// backend/src/common/middleware/logger.middleware.ts
import { Injectable, NestMiddleware, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import { Request, Response, NextFunction } from 'express';

@Injectable()
export class LoggerMiddleware implements NestMiddleware {
  private logger = new Logger('HTTP');

  use(request: Request, response: Response, next: NextFunction): void {
    const { method, originalUrl } = request;
    
    response.on('finish', () => {
      const { statusCode } = response;
      this.logger.log(
        `[REQUEST] ${method} ${originalUrl} - ${statusCode}`
      );
    });

    next();
  }
}
--- END FILE: backend/src/common/middleware/logger.middleware.ts ---

--- START FILE: backend/src/events/events.controller.ts ---

import { Controller, Post, Body, UseGuards, HttpCode, HttpStatus, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import { PluginApiKeyGuard } from '../auth/guards/plugin-api-key.guard';
import { EventsService } from './events.service';
import { ApiHeader, ApiOperation, ApiTags } from '@nestjs/swagger';
import { UsersService } from 'src/users/users.service';
import { IsString, IsNotEmpty, IsObject, IsArray, ValidateNested } from 'class-validator';
import { Type } from 'class-transformer';

/**
 * DTO for a single game event.
 */
class EventDto {
  @IsString()
  eventType: string;
}

/**
 * DTO for a batch of events from a player.
 */
class EventBatchDto {
  @IsString()
  playerUuid: string;

  @IsString()
  server_group: string;

  @IsObject()
  snapshot: any;

  @IsArray()
  @ValidateNested({ each: true })
  @Type(() => EventDto)
  events: EventDto[];
}

/**
 * Internal controller for receiving events from game server plugins.
 * Protected by a secret API key.
 */
@ApiTags('Internal')
@Controller('internal')
export class EventsController {
  private readonly logger = new Logger(EventsController.name);

  constructor(private readonly eventsService: EventsService, private readonly usersService: UsersService) { }

  /**
   * Ingests a batch of game events from a plugin.
   * Immediately returns an acceptance response and processes the event asynchronously.
   * @param eventDto The batch of events and player snapshot data.
   * @returns A confirmation message that the event has been accepted.
   */
  @Post('event-ingest')
  @UseGuards(PluginApiKeyGuard)
  @HttpCode(HttpStatus.ACCEPTED)
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Endpoint for receiving game events from the proxy.' })
  @ApiHeader({ name: 'x-api-key', required: true })
  async handleGameEvent(@Body() eventDto: any) {
    const responseMessage = { message: 'Event accepted for processing.' };
    this.processGameEventInBackground(eventDto);
    return responseMessage;
  }

  /**
   * Processes the received game event batch in the background to avoid delaying the plugin.
   * @param batchDto The event data to process.
   */
  private async processGameEventInBackground(batchDto: any): Promise<void> {
    const { playerUuid, snapshot, events, server_group } = batchDto;

    if (!playerUuid || !snapshot || !events || !Array.isArray(events) || !server_group) {
      this.logger.warn(`Received incomplete game event batch: ${JSON.stringify(batchDto)}`);
      return;
    }

    const user = await this.usersService.findUserByMinecraftUuid(playerUuid);
    if (!user) {
      this.logger.warn(`User with UUID ${playerUuid} not found. Skipping batch.`);
      return;
    }

    for (const event of events) {
      if (!event.eventType) continue;
      try {
        await this.eventsService.processEvent(
          event.eventType,
          user.id,
          server_group,
          { snapshot }
        );
      } catch (e) {
        this.logger.error(`Failed to process sub-event: ${JSON.stringify(event)}`, e.stack);
      }
    }
  }

  /**
   * Receives rank updates from a game server plugin to sync with the website.
   * @param rankSyncDto DTO containing the player's UUID and new rank system name.
   * @returns A confirmation message.
   */
  @Post('rank-sync')
  @UseGuards(PluginApiKeyGuard)
  @HttpCode(HttpStatus.OK)
  @ApiOperation({ summary: 'Endpoint for receiving rank updates from a game server.' })
  @ApiHeader({ name: 'x-api-key', required: true })
  async syncRank(@Body() rankSyncDto: { minecraftUuid: string; newRankSystemName: string }) {
    this.logger.log(`[RANK-SYNC-HTTP] 🔄 Received rank update for UUID ${rankSyncDto.minecraftUuid} to rank "${rankSyncDto.newRankSystemName}"`);
    await this.usersService.updateRankFromGameEvent(rankSyncDto.minecraftUuid, rankSyncDto.newRankSystemName);
    return { message: 'Rank sync accepted.' };
  }
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/events/events.controller.ts ---

import { Module } from '@nestjs/common';
import { TypeOrmModule } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
import { EventsController } from './events.controller';
import { EventsService } from './events.service';
import { User } from '../users/entities/user.entity';
import { PendingCommand } from '../shop/entities/pending-command.entity';
import { PluginApiKeyGuard } from '../auth/guards/plugin-api-key.guard';
import { UsersModule } from 'src/users/users.module';
import { Comment } from '../comments/entities/comment.entity';
import { AchievementsModule } from 'src/achievements/achievements.module';
import { ServerGroup } from 'src/achievements/entities/server-group.entity';
import { Achievement } from '../achievements/entities/achievement.entity';
import { AchievementProgress } from '../achievements/entities/achievement-progress.entity';

/**
 * Module responsible for handling internal game and website events.
 * It serves as a central hub for processing triggers for other systems, like achievements.
 */
@Module({
  imports: [
    TypeOrmModule.forFeature([
      Achievement,
      AchievementProgress,
      User,
      PendingCommand,
      Comment,
      ServerGroup
    ]),
    UsersModule,
    AchievementsModule,
  ],
  controllers: [EventsController],
  providers: [EventsService, PluginApiKeyGuard],
  exports: [EventsService],
})
export class EventsModule { }

--- START FILE: backend/src/events/events.service.ts ---

import { Injectable, Logger } from '@nestjs/common';
import { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';
import { Repository } from 'typeorm';
import { Achievement } from '../achievements/entities/achievement.entity';
import { AchievementProgress } from '../achievements/entities/achievement-progress.entity';
import { User } from '../users/entities/user.entity';
import { PendingCommand } from '../shop/entities/pending-command.entity';
import { EventEmitter2, OnEvent } from '@nestjs/event-emitter';
import * as _ from 'lodash';
import { Comment } from '../comments/entities/comment.entity';
import { ServerGroup } from 'src/achievements/entities/server-group.entity';

/**
 * Service that acts as a central processor for various in-game and website events.
 * It primarily listens for events and updates user achievement progress accordingly.
 */
@Injectable()
export class EventsService {
    private readonly logger = new Logger(EventsService.name);

    constructor(
        @InjectRepository(Achievement)
        private achievementsRepository: Repository<Achievement>,
        @InjectRepository(AchievementProgress)
        private progressRepository: Repository<AchievementProgress>,
        @InjectRepository(User)
        private usersRepository: Repository<User>,
        @InjectRepository(PendingCommand)
        private pendingCommandsRepository: Repository<PendingCommand>,
        private eventEmitter: EventEmitter2,
        @InjectRepository(Comment)
        private commentsRepository: Repository<Comment>,
        @InjectRepository(ServerGroup)
        private serverGroupsRepository: Repository<ServerGroup>,
    ) { }

    /**
     * Processes a generic event, finds relevant achievements, and updates user progress.
     * @param eventType The full event type string (e.g., 'WEBSITE_EVENT:POST_CREATED').
     * @param userId The ID of the user who triggered the event.
     * @param serverGroup The server group where the event originated (e.g., 'survival', 'website').
     * @param eventData Additional data associated with the event.
     */
    public async processEvent(eventType: string, userId: number, serverGroup: string, eventData: any = {}): Promise<void> {
        const user = await this.usersRepository.findOneBy({ id: userId });
        if (!user) {
            this.logger.warn(`[PROCESS_EVENT] User with ID ${userId} not found. Skipping event ${eventType}.`);
            return;
        }

        this.logger.log(`[PROCESS_EVENT] Received event '${eventType}' for User ID ${userId} from Server Group '${serverGroup}'.`);

        const relevantAchievements = await this.getRelevantAchievements(eventType.split(':')[0]);
        if (relevantAchievements.length === 0) {
            return;
        }

        this.logger.verbose(`Found ${relevantAchievements.length} relevant achievements for event type '${eventType}'.`);

        for (const achievement of relevantAchievements) {
            await this.updateProgressForAchievement(user, achievement, eventType, serverGroup, eventData);
        }

        if (serverGroup && serverGroup !== 'website') {
            await this.serverGroupsRepository.upsert({ name: serverGroup }, ['name']);
        }
    }

    /**
     * A convenience method to trigger a website-specific event.
     * @param subType The specific type of website event (e.g., 'POST_CREATED').
     * @param userId The ID of the user who triggered the event.
     * @param eventData Additional data associated with the event.
     */
    public async triggerWebsiteEvent(subType: string, userId: number, eventData: any = {}): Promise<void> {
        const eventType = `WEBSITE_EVENT:${subType}`;
        await this.processEvent(eventType, userId, 'website', eventData);
    }

    /**
     * Finds all enabled achievements that listen to a specific base trigger.
     * @param baseTrigger The base trigger type (e.g., 'GAME_EVENT').
     * @returns A promise that resolves to an array of matching achievements.
     */
    private getRelevantAchievements(baseTrigger: string) {
        return this.achievementsRepository
            .createQueryBuilder("achievement")
            .where("achievement.is_enabled = :isEnabled", { isEnabled: true })
            .andWhere(`achievement.conditions -> 'conditions' @> '[{"trigger": "${baseTrigger}"}]'`)
            .getMany();
    }

    /**
     * Updates a user's progress for a single achievement based on an event.
     * @param user The user entity.
     * @param achievement The achievement entity.
     * @param eventType The full event type string.
     * @param serverGroup The server group of the event.
     * @param eventData Additional event data.
     */
    private async updateProgressForAchievement(user: User, achievement: Achievement, eventType: string, serverGroup: string, eventData: any) {
        let progress = await this.progressRepository.findOne({
            where: { user_id: user.id, achievement_id: achievement.id }
        });

        if (progress?.is_completed) return;

        if (!progress) {
            progress = this.progressRepository.create({
                user_id: user.id,
                achievement_id: achievement.id,
                progress_data: {}
            });
        }

        let progressChanged = false;
        const conditions = achievement.conditions?.conditions || [];

        for (const condition of conditions) {
            if (condition.server_groups && Array.isArray(condition.server_groups) && condition.server_groups.length > 0) {
                if (!condition.server_groups.includes(serverGroup)) {
                    continue;
                }
            }

            if (condition.trigger === eventType.split(':')[0] && condition.target === eventType) {
                const allChecksPassed = this.validateChecks(condition.checks || [], eventData);

                if (allChecksPassed) {
                    const conditionKey = `condition_${condition.index}`;
                    const value = typeof eventData.value === 'number' ? eventData.value : 1;

                    if (condition.tracking === 'state') {
                        progress.progress_data[conditionKey] = value;
                    } else {
                        progress.progress_data[conditionKey] = (progress.progress_data[conditionKey] || 0) + value;
                    }
                    progressChanged = true;
                }
            }
        }

        if (progressChanged) {
            const savedProgress = await this.progressRepository.save(progress);
            await this.checkAndCompleteAchievement(user, achievement, savedProgress);
        }
    }

    /**
     * Validates a set of nested checks against the event data snapshot.
     * @param checks An array of check objects from the achievement conditions.
     * @param eventData The event data containing the snapshot.
     * @returns `true` if all checks pass, otherwise `false`.
     */
    private validateChecks(checks: any[], eventData: any): boolean {
        for (const check of checks) {
            const fullPath = `${check.source}.${check.property}`;
            const actualValue = _.get(eventData.snapshot, fullPath);

            if (actualValue === undefined) {
                this.logger.warn(`[Check-Validate] Property at path "${fullPath}" not found in eventData.snapshot`);
                return false;
            }

            let checkPassed = false;
            const requiredValue = check.value;

            switch (check.operator) {
                case '==':
                    checkPassed = String(actualValue) == String(requiredValue);
                    break;
                case '>=':
                    checkPassed = Number(actualValue) >= Number(requiredValue);
                    break;
                case '<=':
                    checkPassed = Number(actualValue) <= Number(requiredValue);
                    break;
                case 'contains':
                    checkPassed = Array.isArray(actualValue) && actualValue.map(String).includes(String(requiredValue));
                    break;
                default:
                    checkPassed = false;
            }

            this.logger.debug(`[Check-Validate] Path: "${fullPath}", Game Value: "${actualValue}" (${typeof actualValue}), Operator: "${check.operator}", Required: "${requiredValue}" (${typeof requiredValue}). Result: ${checkPassed ? '✅' : '❌'}`);

            if (!checkPassed) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Checks if all conditions for an achievement are met and marks it as complete if so.
     * @param user The user entity.
     * @param achievement The achievement entity.
     * @param progress The user's progress entity for this achievement.
     */
    private async checkAndCompleteAchievement(user: User, achievement: Achievement, progress: AchievementProgress) {
        const logic = achievement.conditions?.logic || 'AND';
        const conditions = achievement.conditions?.conditions || [];

        if (conditions.length === 0) return;

        let allConditionsMet = logic === 'AND';

        for (const condition of conditions) {
            const conditionKey = `condition_${condition.index}`;
            const currentProgress = progress.progress_data[conditionKey] || 0;
            const requiredCount = condition.count;

            const isConditionMet = currentProgress >= requiredCount;

            if (logic === 'AND') {
                if (!isConditionMet) {
                    allConditionsMet = false;
                    break;
                }
            } else { // 'OR' logic
                if (isConditionMet) {
                    allConditionsMet = true;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }

        if (allConditionsMet && !progress.is_completed) {
            progress.is_completed = true;
            progress.completed_at = new Date();
            await this.progressRepository.save(progress);

            this.logger.log(`ACHIEVEMENT COMPLETED: User ${user.username} (ID: ${user.id}) has completed "${achievement.name}"!`);

            if (achievement.reward_command && user.minecraft_username) {
                const command = achievement.reward_command.replace('{username}', user.minecraft_username);
                const newCommand = this.pendingCommandsRepository.create({ command });
                await this.pendingCommandsRepository.save(newCommand);
                this.eventEmitter.emit('command.queued');
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * Listens for the 'comment.created' event to trigger achievements.
     * @param payload The event payload containing the author's ID.
     */
    @OnEvent('comment.created', { async: true })
    async handleCommentCreated(payload: { authorId: number }) {
        this.logger.log(`[Event Caught] Caught 'comment.created' for author ID: ${payload.authorId}`);
        try {
            const totalComments = await this.commentsRepository.count({
                where: { authorId: payload.authorId },
            });
            await this.triggerWebsiteEvent('COMMENT_CREATED', payload.authorId, { value: totalComments });
        } catch (error) {
            this.logger.error('Failed to process comment.created event', error.stack);
        }
    }
}

--- START FILE: backend/src/friendships/entities/friendship.entity.ts ---

import {
  Entity,
  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
  Column,
  CreateDateColumn,
  ManyToOne,
  JoinColumn,
  UpdateDateColumn,
  Index,
} from 'typeorm';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';
import { FriendStatuses } from '../../common/enums/friend-statuses.enum';

/**
 * Represents a friendship link between two users in the database.
 * A unique index on requester/receiver ensures no duplicate requests can exist.
 */
@Entity('friendships')
@Index(['requester_id', 'receiver_id'], { unique: true })
export class Friendship {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the friendship record.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user who initiated the request.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'requester_id' })
  requester_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity of the requester.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, (user) => user.sent_friend_requests, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'requester_id' })
  requester: User;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user who received the request.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'receiver_id' })
  receiver_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity of the receiver.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, (user) => user.received_friend_requests, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'receiver_id' })
  receiver: User;

  /**
   * The current status of the friendship (e.g., PENDING, ACCEPTED, BLOCKED).
   */
  @Column({
    type: 'enum',
    enum: FriendStatuses,
    default: FriendStatuses.PENDING,
  })
  status: FriendStatuses;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the friendship request was created.
   */
  @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'created_at' })
  created_at: Date;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the friendship record was last updated.
   */
  @UpdateDateColumn({ name: 'updated_at' })
  updated_at: Date;
}

--- END FILE: backend/src/friendships/entities/friendship.entity.ts ---



--- START FILE: backend/src/friendships/entities/friendship-rejection.entity.ts ---

import {
  CreateDateColumn,
  Entity,
  JoinColumn,
  ManyToOne,
  PrimaryGeneratedColumn,
  Unique,
  Column,
} from 'typeorm';
import { User } from '../../users/entities/user.entity';

/**
 * Represents a record of a user rejecting a friend request from another user.
 * This is used to prevent users from spamming friend requests after being rejected.
 */
@Entity('friendship_rejections')
@Unique(['rejector_id', 'requester_id'])
export class FriendshipRejection {
  /**
   * The unique identifier for the rejection record.
   */
  @PrimaryGeneratedColumn()
  id: number;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user who rejected the request.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'rejector_id' })
  rejector_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity of the rejector.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'rejector_id' })
  rejector: User;

  /**
   * The foreign key of the user whose request was rejected.
   */
  @Column({ name: 'requester_id' })
  requester_id: number;

  /**
   * The relationship to the User entity of the requester.
   */
  @ManyToOne(() => User, { onDelete: 'CASCADE' })
  @JoinColumn({ name: 'requester_id' })
  requester: User;

  /**
   * The timestamp when the rejection occurred.
   */
  @CreateDateColumn({ name: 'rejected_at' })
  rejected_at: Date;
}
